agents.empty: No agents yet. Create one to get started.
agents.emptyHint: paste a few lines of your agent's dialogue, hear each voice read them, and save the one that fits.
agents.emptyHintAlt: Or create a profile directly and pick a voice from the list.

agentCard.name: Name
agentCard.confirmDelete: This will permanently remove this agent.
agentCard.proseOnly: Prose only — skip code blocks and lists
agentCard.defaultTestText: The pattern holds. We're moving forward.
agentCard.cantReachServer: Can't reach server. Is Clarion running?
agentCard.backendNotConfigured: backend is not configured on this server.

backend.googleDesc: Google Cloud voices (Chirp 3 HD), requires API key

serverConfig.label: Clarion server URL
serverConfig.hint: Point this at your running Clarion server.
serverConfig.urlErrorProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://
serverConfig.keyHint: Stored securely in your browser — the key never leaves your device. Requests are signed with HMAC-SHA256.

testText: Hello. This is your agent speaking. The voice is configured and ready.

audition.description: Paste your agent's dialogue below. Each voice will read their words — find the one that fits, then save it as an agent.
audition.hint: Paste a few lines. Short, characteristic sentences work best — the kind your agent actually says.
audition.defaultText: The pattern holds. We're moving forward.
audition.kokoroWarmup: Kokoro may take a moment on the first request while the model warms up.
audition.offline: is offline — start your server to audition these voices.

crewLog.emptyHint: Test an agent's voice from the Agents tab to see the log here.

remediation.kokoroDown: Is Docker running? Start Docker Desktop, then: docker-compose up -d
remediation.piperDown: Is the Piper server running? Check PIPER_SERVER in your server .env
remediation.elevenlabsDown: API key may be expired or invalid. Renew at elevenlabs.io/account
remediation.googleDown: API key may be invalid. Check GOOGLE_TTS_API_KEY in your server .env
remediation.chatterboxDown: Is the Chatterbox server running? Check CHATTERBOX_SERVER in your server .env. Requires an NVIDIA GPU.
